title: nepeta praetervisa
intro: Nepeta praetervisa, also known as catmint or Nepeta, is a perennial flowering plant in the mint family that is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Nepeta praetervisa include reducing symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, as well as providing relief from digestive issues and allergies. Herbal preparations of Nepeta praetervisa can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
